Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the main page.

Title: Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter an incorrect password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Inactive Account
Preconditions: User has registered but their account is inactive.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Registration
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Enter personal information.
5. Accept the privacy policy.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User is registered, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter an invalid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Enter personal information.
5. Accept the privacy policy.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the registration page.

Title: Password Mismatch
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information, but the passwords do not match.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a password.
4. Enter the same password again, but with a typo.
5. Enter personal information.
6. Accept the privacy policy.
7. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the registration page.

Title: Insert New Item
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the MyBoard page.
2. Click the "Insert New Item" button.
3. Upload a valid image.
4. Enter valid item information.
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The new item is saved, and the user is displayed their personal items.

Title: Delete Item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the MyBoard page.
2. Select an item to delete.
3. Click the "Delete" button.
4. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: The selected item is deleted, and the user is displayed their remaining personal items.

Title: Accept Exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an available exchange.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Exchange page.
2. Select an exchange to accept.
3. Click the "Accept" button.
4. Confirm the acceptance.
Expected Result: The selected exchange is accepted, and the user is displayed the updated list of available exchanges.

Title: Reject Exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an available exchange.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Exchange page.
2. Select an exchange to reject.
3. Click the "Reject" button.
4. Confirm the rejection.
Expected Result: The selected exchange is rejected, and the user is displayed the updated list of available exchanges.

Title: Successful Navigation to Filtered Items
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Apply a filter.
Expected Result: User is displayed the filtered list of items.

Title: Update Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Edit" button.
3. Update personal information.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's personal information is updated, and the user is displayed their updated information.

Title: Incomplete Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Edit" button.
3. Enter incomplete personal information.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is displayed their personal information with the incomplete fields highlighted.
